audit_correction.action: Add same-sign QCD/fake template; derive multivariate background input reweighting before classifier training; loosen DY/Z normalization; evaluate the calibrated categorized score model as a diagnostic.
audit_correction.reason: Large expected/observed discrepancy traced to missing reducible QCD/fake background, DY/Z normalization limitations, and uncorrected data/MC input-shape differences.

model.caveat: Expected-only MC gain; severe input modelling caveats require Phase 4b validation before unqualified promotion.
model.description: classifier score templates in VBF, boosted, and zero-jet signal-region channels
model.input_reweighting: background_input_reweight from phase3_selection/outputs/input_reweighting.json is applied to background templates when present
model.name: mva_hist_gradient_boosting_score_baseline_categories
model.status: expected-primary candidate pending Phase 4b score-modelling validation/calibration

gate.rule: The optimized classifier is rejected if it has a boundary-like limit, a large q0 diagnostic, or a gross combined normalization mismatch.

calibrated_score_qcd_primary.interpretation: Rejected optimized classifier study retained only for validation diagnostics.

addmet_mass_qcd_crosscheck.category_assignment: rederived VBF/boosted/zero-jet rules for control-region rows
limitations: No anti-isolated tau branch is available in the selected-event artifact.
The transfer factor is measured in the lowest observable bin and propagated globally.
The VBF MC-background control scale is applied before non-QCD subtraction.
QCD shape-statistical uncertainties are recorded for validation but not expanded into per-bin pyhf nuisances in the final workspace.
addmet_mass_qcd_crosscheck.method: same-sign low-mT data minus non-QCD MC, transferred to opposite-sign signal candidates

transfer_sideband.description: lowest fitted-observable bin, chosen as the most signal-depleted control bin
